claim_bullets.bullet_text: The front matter contains the cover image of the book (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13).

Lean Publishing is described as publishing an in-progress e‑book with lightweight tools and iterative feedback to pivot until the right book is achieved (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13). May be an iterative process.
Lean Publishing empowers authors and publishers with this process (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-13).

source_record_text: Front matter of JavaScript Allongé, the ‘Six’ Edition, covering title, author, publishing info, and initial prefaces. May include a cover image.
